creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 171749
Switch version from 1.0.4 to 1.1.0 on multimedia/qmmp-plugin-pack-qt5

qmmp-plugin-pack version 1.1.0 has been released after qmmp-1.1.0
(bug 210524).  At this release, samplereate converter efffect plugin
is moved from qmmp package.

Since this update, SRCONV option is added.
